item.title: About
item.description: Hey there My name is Gisele, I’m currently a rising senior at the University of Washington graduating with a degree in informatics. I’m currently a TA for INFO 200 at the University of Washington and scoop icecream at the heaven that is Sweet Alchemy. What is Informatics? Here is some markdown including a link. Donec erat est, feugiat a est sed, aliquet pharetra ipsum. Vivamus in arcu leo.

item.title: Things I Like
item.description: A master list I add to from time to time This Tour of Douglas Wan's Micro Studio - I think this is the perfect apartmnet tour and I think this is the perfect living space. His bed/couch/table combo is the most ingeniuos solution to a studio I've seen and I actively try to model my living spaces after this one apartment. Poet Square Cats - An Arizona based cat colony headed by Sad Boy and Lola.
